name: Inpatient Encounter/Discharge Codes
description: CPT and UB revenue codes for inpatient hospital stays, including initial hospital care, subsequent care, and discharge management. Used in follow-up after hospitalization (FUH) and plan all-cause readmission (PCR) measures.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

Initial hospital care, per day, high severity

Subsequent hospital care, per day, moderate severity
Subsequent hospital care, per day, high severity

Observation or inpatient hospital care, including admission and discharge, same date, high severity
